actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / open-surface bridge intake; no current PR230 closure
conditional_surface_status: exact support if a future accepted route supplies certified O_H plus production C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pole rows with Gram flatness, or a physical neutral rank-one theorem, or a strict W/Z physical-response packet without forbidden imports

fallback_next_route.audit_posture: method bridge only; valid after actual Euclidean time rows and operator certificate exist
fallback_next_route.external_surface: OS reconstruction + lattice transfer matrix positivity
fallback_next_route.immediate_target: Run a tiny source-Higgs time-kernel scout after an explicit O_H candidate is supplied; require C_ss(t), C_sH(t), C_HH(t), GEVP pole residue, covariance, and FV/IR gates.
fallback_next_route.repo_disjunct_supplied_if_successful: production pole rows and Gram flatness for a certified operator basis
fallback_next_route.why_relevant: The current finite static rows are underdetermined.  OS/transfer machinery says the right object is a time-ordered correlator kernel and spectral/pole residue extraction, not equal-time aliasing.

parent_statuses.campaign_status: open / active campaign continuing after current shortcut blocks
parent_statuses.canonical_oh_hard_residual: exact negative boundary / canonical O_H hard residual not closed on current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.neutral_h3h4_aperture: bounded-support / neutral primitive H3/H4 aperture checkpoint; H1/H2 support and 44 C_sx/C_xx chunks do not supply physical neutral transfer or source-canonical-Higgs coupling
parent_statuses.source_higgs_aperture: bounded-support / source-Higgs bridge aperture checkpoint; 46 completed C_sx/C_xx chunks do not close canonical O_H or C_sH/C_HH Gram flatness
parent_statuses.source_higgs_time_kernel_manifest: bounded-support / source-Higgs time-kernel production manifest; canonical O_H or physical neutral identity absent and no rows launched
parent_statuses.wz_response_intake: exact negative boundary / WZ physical-response packet not present on current PR230 surface; only scout/schema and support-contract artifacts exist

proposal_allowed_reason: The artifact surveys external/open surfaces as route guidance only. It imports no proof authority and supplies no certified O_H, pole rows, rank-one theorem, accepted W/Z action, production W/Z rows, covariance, strict g2 certificate, or production top response.

ranked_routes.audit_posture: open-surface candidate; would need accepted same-surface EW/Higgs action or derivation from Cl(3)/Z^3 before proof use
ranked_routes.immediate_target: Promote the existing source-Higgs time-kernel manifest into a pilot that consumes an explicit candidate gauge-invariant O_H definition, then require Gram flatness rather than setting overlap factors to one.
ranked_routes.repo_disjunct_supplied_if_successful: certified O_H plus C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pole rows
ranked_routes.why_relevant: FMS gives the right language for a gauge-invariant physical Higgs operator.  If PR230 can build O_H as a same-surface composite and measure source-Higgs time-kernel rows, this directly attacks the O_sp/O_H overlap residual without Ward/H_unit renaming.

ranked_routes.audit_posture: method bridge only; valid after actual Euclidean time rows and operator certificate exist
ranked_routes.external_surface: OS reconstruction + lattice transfer matrix positivity
ranked_routes.immediate_target: Run a tiny source-Higgs time-kernel scout after an explicit O_H candidate is supplied; require C_ss(t), C_sH(t), C_HH(t), GEVP pole residue, covariance, and FV/IR gates.
ranked_routes.repo_disjunct_supplied_if_successful: production pole rows and Gram flatness for a certified operator basis
ranked_routes.why_relevant: The current finite static rows are underdetermined.  OS/transfer machinery says the right object is a time-ordered correlator kernel and spectral/pole residue extraction, not equal-time aliasing.

ranked_routes.audit_posture: hard theorem route; blocked until PR230 supplies a physical positivity-improving transfer kernel
ranked_routes.immediate_target: Formulate H3/H4 as a concrete positive-kernel problem: operator space, cone, compactness, irreducibility, and source/Higgs coupling functional.  Do not claim rank one from PSD bounds alone.
ranked_routes.why_relevant: Block07 reduced the obstruction to PSD flatness Delta_spH=0.  A genuine positivity-improving transfer theorem could force rank one in the neutral scalar channel, but reflection positivity alone is insufficient.

ranked_routes.audit_posture: compute/method route; Yukawa must not be an input tuned to the answer
ranked_routes.immediate_target: Use only as a validation template for operator construction, correlator fitting, and uncertainty accounting; do not count as derived y_t unless m_t is predicted from substrate data.
ranked_routes.why_relevant: This is the nearest established nonperturbative compute route for the top/bottom/Higgs sector.  It can benchmark PR230 methodology, but it does not avoid the bridge if y_t is merely a scanned input.

ranked_routes.audit_posture: new principle/import unless beta_lambda(M_Pl)=0 is derived from Cl(3)/Z^3
ranked_routes.immediate_target: Keep as an independent lane only if the Planck boundary condition is derived natively; do not use it to patch PR230 O_H closure.
ranked_routes.repo_disjunct_supplied_if_successful: external boundary condition on y_t via SM RGE
ranked_routes.why_relevant: Criticality can numerically point at top mass, but it is not the PR230 physical-observable source-Higgs bridge.  It remains a separate axiom/derivation problem and has known SM tension.

If PR230 can build O_H as a same-surface composite and measure source-Higgs time-kernel rows, this directly attacks the O_sp/O_H overlap residual without Ward/H_unit renaming.
